commit.message:
feat: intelligent reminder lead time based on task type

- Meeting/appointment: remind 30 min before (not at start time)
- Payment/bills: remind 3 days before
- Deadline/submission: remind 1 day before
- Travel/flight: remind 2 hours before
- Medical appointment: remind 1 hour before
- Other timed tasks: remind 15 min before
- No time specified: remind at 9am on due date

Also: reminder confirmation always shows actual remind time vs due time

commit.message:
Switch ComStock profile generation to single-model selection

Previously, profiles were computed by weighted-averaging all matching
ComStock models. Users now select one representative model explicitly,
which is much faster (one parquet read vs. N) and gives more control.

Changes:
- Schema: replace comstockMatchCount with comstockBldgId on LoadProfile
- generate-profile: single-model query + scale by sqft ratio
- generate-upgrade-profile: single-model upgrade parquet lookup
- API generate-profile: accept bldgId instead of filter params
- API generate-upgrade-profile: derive bldgId from stored comstockBldgId
- ComstockModelPicker: interactive search + select table (replaces informational list)
- LoadProfileTab: model picker inline before first generate; "Change model" button when profile exists

commit.message:
Fix DuckDB build: pin Node.js 20 via nixpacks.toml

DuckDB 1.4.4 has pre-built binaries for Node 20 (node-v115 ABI) on
Linux x64. Node 18 has no pre-built binary and source compilation
requires Python which is not in the Nixpacks default environment.

commit.message:
fix: 修复双K止损在Kn创新低后回升时误触发问题

原逻辑用 kn.low 与 min(K1.low, K2.low) 比较，一旦 kn.low 跌破阈值
就持续触发，导致开仓于 Kn 回升阶段（当前价 > kn.low）时被误止损。

新逻辑：每笔 tick 先检查后更新
  - 止损条件改为: tick_price < min(Kn.low_before, K1.low, K2.low)
  - 只有新 tick 真正突破所有已知最低点时才触发
  - _check_and_fire(price) 移至 on_tick() 之前调用，确保 Kn.low 尚未更新
  - 删除 _entry_bar_time 特判逻辑（新机制天然覆盖该场景）

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: prevent triple partial-stop fires on micro-cap after stop-out

After a fast-loop final stop exits a position, evictMicroCap removes the
token from _cachedMicroCaps. But the main watchdog loop (running every 30s)
re-adds it from basePortfolio if the wallet RPC still shows a stale balance.
On the next fast tick, clearSymbolState already cleared the partialStops
guard, so scanPartialStops fires again — repeat until RPC cache expires.

Fix: exclude stop-cooled symbols from _cachedMicroCaps rebuild. Tokens in
stop-cooldown were just stopped out and should not be re-watched by the
fast exit loop, regardless of what the wallet RPC reports.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat: Phase 3 — AI analysis and clip scoring engine

Multi-signal highlight detection pipeline:
- LLM analyzer (Ollama, batched, graceful fallback)
- Sentence-transformer topic segmentation + coherence scoring
- Librosa RMS energy burst detection (laughter/applause)
- Heuristic emotion scorer (punctuation, caps, word lists)
- Heuristic controversy detector (rhetorical patterns, claim phrases)
- Composite scorer (8 weighted signals, auto-clip threshold 0.60)

Writes 7 AnalysisScore types per segment; auto-creates Clip rows for
segments above threshold. Full router at /api/analysis/{item_id}/*.

feat: custom channels, channel-targeted posts, and LDAP user provisioning

Three new post-setup capabilities:

1. Custom channel creation
   - mm-repro seed --channels "support,bugs,release-notes"
   - make channels NAMES="support,bugs" PASS=Sysadmin1!
   - Channels are created beyond the default town-square/off-topic

2. Channel-targeted post seeding
   - mm-repro seed --channel support  (all posts go into ~support)
   - make seed CHANNEL=support PASS=Sysadmin1!
   - Can be combined: --channels "support" --channel support

3. LDAP user provisioning
   - make ldap-users  (loads 8 test users + 4 groups via ldapadd)
   - Generates ldap/users.ldif with alice.johnson, bob.smith, carol.white,
     dave.brown, eve.davis, frank.miller, grace.wilson, henry.moore
   - Password: Repro1234! for all users
   - Only generated when LDAP is enabled in the repro plan
   - Volume-mounted into openldap container (./ldap:/ldap:ro)
   - Re-runnable — existing entries are silently skipped

README updated with full usage examples for all three features.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix audio transcription: use native FormData instead of npm form-data

The npm form-data package produces corrupted multipart data when used
with Node.js native fetch, causing OpenAI Whisper API to return
"Could not parse multipart form". Switched to native FormData + Blob
(available in Node.js 18+) which works correctly with native fetch.
Removed form-data from dependencies as it's no longer needed.

commit.message:
feat: add VT100 emulator for proper terminal rendering

Replace naive strings.Builder with charmbracelet/x/vt SafeEmulator
in pane rendering. The VT emulator interprets ANSI escape sequences
(cursor positioning, colors, screen clearing) producing correct
terminal output instead of garbled raw bytes.

- Add charmbracelet/x/vt dependency for VT100 emulation
- PaneModel uses SafeEmulator (thread-safe write + render)
- Resize VT emulator when pane dimensions change
- Add daemon startup banner to stdout for visibility

commit.message:
Add table retention floor for stable foreground preservation

3-way mask merge: depth + person + table floor.
- Soft sigmoid (0.10) retains mid-distance people instead of making them transparent
- Quadratic vertical floor guarantees bottom 55% stays opaque (table/food area)
- Mild depth bias (0.85) + vertical weight (0.30) for balanced depth masking
- Fixes center table/people transparency from previous aggressive parameters

commit.message:
fix: prevent duplicate sells, stale entry prices, and stop-loss slippage

- executor: detect stop/ladder/trailing sells → use 300 bps slippage instead
  of 100 bps to avoid 0x1788 SlippageToleranceExceeded on urgent exits
- exit-manager: always overwrite entry price on re-buy (removes stale guard),
  clear trailing/ladder state via clearSymbolState, acquire shared sell lock
  in executeSell to prevent concurrent duplicate exits
- reason.js: add sell lock to profit ladder bypass path so it cannot race with
  exit-manager or watchdog; use td.price (current market) first for entry
  price on re-buys instead of persisted stale price

commit.message:
Add email system Phase 1: badge/milestone emails, broadcast center, welcome email, inbox polish

Phase 1 of the email system audit and enhancement:

- Badge achievement email: consolidated per-sync via DeferredNotificationService,
  gated by badge_notifications preference
- Milestone achievement email: consolidated per-sync (one email for all milestones
  earned in a single sync cycle), matching badge pattern. Non-sync paths send
  immediately via send_email=True default on check_all_milestones_for_user()
- Welcome email: sent once after first successful PSN sync, idempotent via EmailLog
- Broadcast center: extended Notification Center with email toggle, markdown body,
  CTA fields, email preview tab, and companion email sending
- Admin announcement inbox detail: purpose-built layout with gradient header,
  styled message body, and attribution footer
- Email preferences: added weekly_digest toggle, linked from profile settings
- New email types in EmailLog: badge_earned, milestone_achieved, welcome
- Email fields on ScheduledNotification and stats on NotificationLog
- Test email previews for all new types via test_email_system command
- Documentation updates for email-setup.md and badge-system.md

commit.message:
refactor: decompose executor.go monolith into focused files (#3)

Split the 1,380-line executor.go into 6 files by concern:
- executor.go (260 lines): struct, constructor, Start/Stop, dashboard
- executor_api.go (267): public API — Add, Get, Cancel, DLQ, Stats
- executor_worker.go (243): workers, execute, middleware chain
- executor_handlers.go (312): result/error/expiry handling
- executor_schedule.go (109): scheduling, timers, replay
- executor_maintenance.go (228): cleanup, stuck recovery, instance creation

Also extracted submethods from handleResult() (162 → ~50 lines):
- spawnChildren(): child instance creation and scheduling
- spawnBarrier(): fan-in barrier creation
- propagateIDs(): deduplicated trace/correlation ID propagation

No behavioral changes. All methods remain on *Executor.

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
